## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.9

### 🧪 Device Actions
- Keeps SBS10/XS03-iWX RF smoke test and mute controls available unless X-Sense explicitly reports the station or child device offline.
- Keeps timestamp-only offline guesses from hiding child smoke detector action buttons.
- Removes the unverified manual self-test action from standalone XS01-WX smoke detectors while keeping the mute action and self-test report sensors.
- Aligns XP0J-iA self-test with the Android app's second-generation self-test path.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for child button availability, XS01-WX action exposure, XP0J-iA self-test payloads, and XS03-iWX mute/test payloads.
